Precondition: Both end effectors empty; tennis_ball_1 on box_1; tennis_ball_2 on box_2.
Postcondition: Right end effector grasping tennis_ball_2; left end effector grasping tennis_ball_1.

Precondition: Right end effector grasping tennis_ball_2; left end effector grasping tennis_ball_1.
Postcondition: tennis_ball_2 on table; tennis_ball_1 on top of box_2; both end effectors empty; top of box_1 free of objects.
